TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: pai patsuni tu aitsu imaza itua kai nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: pai paʦuni tu aiʦu imaza itua kai nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: pai pacuni tu aicu imaza itua kai nua Cemas.
S.PHON: pai paʦuni tu aiʦu imaza itua kai nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: Let us look at this passage here in the word of God.

S.FORM: aitsu a vetsik imaza, kiɫivaku tua nu ɫaqediqedi, aya.
S.PHON: aiʦu a vəʦik imaza, kiʎivaku tua nu ʎaqədiqədi, aja.
S.FORM: aicu a vecik imaza, kiljivaku tua nu ljaqediqedi, aya.
S.PHON: aiʦu a vəʦik imaza, kiʎivaku tua nu ʎaqədiqədi, aja.
S.TRANSL: This writing here says Love your neighbours.

S.FORM: pai izua zua maqatsuvutsuvung vaik a sema zua i tjai Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: pai izua zua maqaʦuvuʦuvuŋ vaik a səma zua i cai jisu-sama.
S.FORM: pai izua zua maqacuvucuvung vaik a sema zua i tjai Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: pai izua zua maqaʦuvuʦuvuŋ vaik a səma zua i ʦai jisu-sama.
S.TRANSL: Now there was a young person who went to Jesus.

S.FORM: "tima mana ku ɫaqediqedi?" aya kivadaq timadju.
S.PHON: "tima mana ku ʎaqədiqədi" aja kivadaq timaɉu.
S.FORM: "tima mana ku ljaqediqedi?" aya kivadaq timadju.
S.PHON: "tima mana ku ʎaqədiqədi" aja kivadaq timaɉu.
S.TRANSL: “Who is my neighbour?” he asked.

S.FORM: manu tevelain ni Yisu-sama: "pai ku su pasemalavay.
S.PHON: manu təvəɭain ni jisu-sama: "pai ku su pasəmaɭavaj.
S.FORM: manu tevelain ni Yisu-sama: "pai ku su pasemalavay.
S.PHON: manu təvəɭain ni jisu-sama: "pai ku su pasəmaɭavaj.
S.TRANSL: And Jesus replied: “I will tell you.

S.FORM: izua zua matsidiɫ a nakemasi zua i Yirusaɫim a pasa Yiriku a patjeɫelauz.
S.PHON: izua zua maʦidiʎ a nakəmasi zua i jirusaʎim a pasa jiriku a pacəʎəɭauz.
S.FORM: izua zua macidilj a nakemasi zua i Yirusaljim a pasa Yiriku a patjeljelauz.
S.PHON: izua zua maʦidiʎ a nakəmasi zua i jirusaʎim a pasa jiriku a paʦəʎəɭauz.
S.TRANSL: There was a person who went down from Jerusalem towards Jericho.

S.FORM: manu setsevung tua za tsaḍ.
S.PHON: manu səʦəvuŋ tua za ʦaɖ.
S.FORM: manu secevung tua za cadr.
S.PHON: manu səʦəvuŋ tua za ʦaɖ.
S.TRANSL: And he met some robbers.

S.FORM: qau azua tsaḍ kirimuin a djemukul timadju, sa uri papatsayi, sa sukava-i timadju, sa paseqerengi, sa alapi aza nanemanemanga, sa vaikan.
S.PHON: qau azua ʦaɖ kirimuin a ɉəmukuɭ timaɉu, sa uri papaʦaji, sa sukava-i timaɉu, sa pasəqərəŋi, sa aɭapi aza nanəmanəmaŋa, sa vaikan.
S.FORM: qau azua cadr kirimuin a djemukul timadju, sa uri papacayi, sa sukava-i timadju, sa paseqerengi, sa alapi aza nanemanemanga, sa vaikan.
S.PHON: qau azua ʦaɖ kirimuin a ɉəmukuɭ timaɉu, sa uri papaʦaji, sa sukava-i timaɉu, sa pasəqərəŋi, sa aɭapi aza nanəmanəmaŋa, sa vaikan.
S.TRANSL: And the robbers quickly beat him up, and were going to kill him, and took off his clothes and knocked him over and took everything, and left him.

S.FORM: qau pai ka naseqereng anga azua matsidiɫ, tsemalivat azua kisamuɫamuɫa i tsakar.
S.PHON: qau pai ka nasəqərəŋ aŋa azua maʦidiʎ, ʦəmaɭivat azua kisamuʎamuʎa i ʦakar.
S.FORM: qau pai ka naseqereng anga azua macidilj, cemalivat azua kisamuljamulja i cakar.
S.PHON: qau pai ka nasəqərəŋ aŋa azua maʦidiʎ, ʦəmaɭivat azua kisamuʎamuʎa i ʦakar.
S.TRANSL: And as the man was lying there, a person who worked hard at the shrine passed by.

S.FORM: manu inika pinatsunan.
S.PHON: manu inika pinaʦunan.
S.FORM: manu inika pinacunan.
S.PHON: manu inika pinaʦunan.
S.TRANSL: He didn’t look at him;

S.FORM: vaik sakamaya timadju a lemagaw a pasulivay tsemalivat.
S.PHON: vaik sakamaja timaɉu a ɭəmagaw a pasuɭivaj ʦəmaɭivat.
S.FORM: vaik sakamaya timadju a lemagaw a pasulivay cemalivat.
S.PHON: vaik sakamaja timaɉu a ɭəmagaw a pasuɭivaj ʦəmaɭivat.
S.TRANSL: he just made a detour and ignored him and passed on.

S.FORM: mangtjez uta a se Ɫibi a tsautsau; manu patsunan aza naseqereng.
S.PHON: maŋcəz uta a sə ʎibi a ʦauʦau; manu paʦunan aza nasəqərəŋ.
S.FORM: mangtjez uta a se Ljibi a caucau; manu pacunan aza naseqereng.
S.PHON: maŋʦəz uta a sə ʎibi a ʦauʦau; manu paʦunan aza nasəqərəŋ.
S.TRANSL: A person from Levi also came. He looked at the person lying there,

S.FORM: lagavan uta nimadju, sa vaik.
S.PHON: ɭagavan uta nimaɉu, sa vaik.
S.FORM: lagavan uta nimadju, sa vaik.
S.PHON: ɭagavan uta nimaɉu, sa vaik.
S.TRANSL: and also made a detour and went.

S.FORM: mangtjez anga a sika masan tjeluɫ a se Samalia a nanguaq aravats a tsautsau.
S.PHON: maŋcəz aŋa a sika masan cəɭuʎ a sə samaɭia a naŋuaq aravaʦ a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: mangtjez anga a sika masan tjelulj a se Samalia a nanguaq aravac a caucau.
S.PHON: maŋʦəz aŋa a sika masan ʦəɭuʎ a sə samaɭia a naŋuaq aravaʦ a ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: The third person to come was a very good person from Samaria.

S.FORM: ɫeteku anga timadju taza kinavavavan a lakuda, sa sazua-i anga patsun aza naseqereng, sa alapan anga tua tsemel nimadju, sa putsemeli, sa tsavu-i anga aza mareka piqay.
S.PHON: ʎətəku aŋa timaɉu taza kinavavavan a ɭakuda, sa sazua-i aŋa paʦun aza nasəqərəŋ, sa aɭapan aŋa tua ʦəməɭ nimaɉu, sa puʦəməɭi, sa ʦavu-i aŋa aza marəka piqaj.
S.FORM: ljeteku anga timadju taza kinavavavan a lakuda, sa sazua-i anga pacun aza naseqereng, sa alapan anga tua cemel nimadju, sa pucemeli, sa cavu-i anga aza mareka piqay.
S.PHON: ʎətəku aŋa timaɉu taza kinavavavan a ɭakuda, sa sazua-i aŋa paʦun aza nasəqərəŋ, sa aɭapan aŋa tua ʦəməɭ nimaɉu, sa puʦəməɭi, sa ʦavu-i aŋa aza marəka piqaj.
S.TRANSL: He got down from the camel he was riding, and went and looked at the person lying there, and got out his medicines and applied them to him, and bandaged the wounds.

S.FORM: pai sa tsatsuɫu-i anga a pasa vavaw tua lakuda nimadju, sa vaikan anga pasa kakasiuɫayan.
S.PHON: pai sa ʦaʦuʎu-i aŋa a pasa vavaw tua ɭakuda nimaɉu, sa vaikan aŋa pasa kakasiuʎajan.
S.FORM: pai sa caculju-i anga a pasa vavaw tua lakuda nimadju, sa vaikan anga pasa kakasiuljayan.
S.PHON: pai sa ʦaʦuʎu-i aŋa a pasa vavaw tua ɭakuda nimaɉu, sa vaikan aŋa pasa kakasiuʎajan.
S.TRANSL: Then he put him on his camel, and went off with him to the inn.

S.FORM: qau pai ka izua i kakasiuɫayan, 'uza a paisu manu uri sikasiuɫay nusa tiza.
S.PHON: qau pai ka izua i kakasiuʎajan, 'uza a paisu manu uri sikasiuʎaj nusa tiza.
S.FORM: qau pai ka izua i kakasiuljayan, 'uza a paisu manu uri sikasiuljay nusa tiza.
S.PHON: qau pai ka izua i kakasiuʎajan, ʔuza a paisu manu uri sikasiuʎaj nusa tiza.
S.TRANSL: And when he was there at the inn the person from Samaria said (to them): ‘Here is some money to pay for this person’s stay.

S.FORM: nu inika kamseng, ku vayi anga uta nutiaw,' ayain nua zua se Samalia a tsautsau.
S.PHON: nu inika kamsəŋ, ku vaji aŋa uta nutiaw,' ajain nua zua sə samaɭia a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: nu inika kamseng, ku vayi anga uta nutiaw,' ayain nua zua se Samalia a caucau.
S.PHON: nu inika kamsəŋ, ku vaji aŋa uta nutiaw,ʔ ajain nua zua sə samaɭia a ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: If it isn’t enough, I’ll give more tomorrow.’

S.FORM: qau pai tisun," ayatutsuin ni Yisu-sama aza maqatsuvutsuvung, "manu inu mana nakiɫivak tua ɫaqediqedi?" ayain.
S.PHON: qau pai tisun," ajatuʦuin ni jisu-sama aza maqaʦuvuʦuvuŋ, "manu inu mana nakiʎivak tua ʎaqədiqədi" ajain.
S.FORM: qau pai tisun," ayatucuin ni Yisu-sama aza maqacuvucuvung, "manu inu mana nakiljivak tua ljaqediqedi?" ayain.
S.PHON: qau pai tisun," ajatuʦuin ni jisu-sama aza maqaʦuvuʦuvuŋ, "manu inu mana nakiʎivak tua ʎaqədiqədi" ajain.
S.TRANSL: “Now as for you,” said Jesus to the young person, “which one loved his neighbour?” he said.

S.FORM: "mavan aza sika masan tjeluɫ mana nakiɫivak tua ɫaqediqedi a napaseqeɫing," aya a temvela.
S.PHON: "mavan aza sika masan cəɭuʎ mana nakiʎivak tua ʎaqədiqədi a napasəqəʎiŋ," aja a təmvəɭa.
S.FORM: "mavan aza sika masan tjelulj mana nakiljivak tua ljaqediqedi a napaseqeljing," aya a temvela.
S.PHON: "mavan aza sika masan ʦəɭuʎ mana nakiʎivak tua ʎaqədiqədi a napasəqəʎiŋ," aja a təmvəɭa.
S.TRANSL: “It was the third one, who showed love to his neighbour and saved him,” he replied.

S.FORM: "qau pai tisun sa-u aitaza-u uta, kiɫivaku tua su ɫaqediqedi," ayain anga ni Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: "qau pai tisun sa-u aitaza-u uta, kiʎivaku tua su ʎaqədiqədi," ajain aŋa ni jisu-sama.
S.FORM: "qau pai tisun sa-u aitaza-u uta, kiljivaku tua su ljaqediqedi," ayain anga ni Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: "qau pai tisun sa-u aitaza-u uta, kiʎivaku tua su ʎaqədiqədi," ajain aŋa ni jisu-sama.
S.TRANSL: “Well you go and do the same; love your neighbours,”Jesus said to him.

S.FORM: pai aitsu nu kinemnem itjen a mapuɫat, aitsu a ɫaqediqedi nu aya, aitsu a ti Yisu, inika manu amin a kipalinguɫ tua tja umaq, inika amin a mareka tja qali a mareka tja kaka nu siayaya.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu nu kinəmnəm icən a mapuʎat, aiʦu a ʎaqədiqədi nu aja, aiʦu a ti jisu, inika manu amin a kipaɭiŋuʎ tua ca umaq, inika amin a marəka ca qaɭi a marəka ca kaka nu siajaja.
S.FORM: pai aicu nu kinemnem itjen a mapuljat, aicu a ljaqediqedi nu aya, aicu a ti Yisu, inika manu amin a kipalingulj tua tja umaq, inika amin a mareka tja qali a mareka tja kaka nu siayaya.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu nu kinəmnəm iʦən a mapuʎat, aiʦu a ʎaqədiqədi nu aja, aiʦu a ti jisu, inika manu amin a kipaɭiŋuʎ tua ʦa umaq, inika amin a marəka ʦa qaɭi a marəka ʦa kaka nu siajaja.
S.TRANSL: Now when we all think about this, when we say neighbour, as for Jesus, it means not only those living round our house, not only our friends or our siblings.

S.FORM: aitsu a imaza i katsauan a mapuɫat, a senema a senema, nuka tsadja aravats, tjara tja ɫaqediqedi a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: aiʦu a imaza i kaʦauan a mapuʎat, a sənəma a sənəma, nuka ʦaɉa aravaʦ, cara ca ʎaqədiqədi a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: aicu a imaza i kacauan a mapuljat, a senema a senema, nuka cadja aravac, tjara tja ljaqediqedi a mapuljat.
S.PHON: aiʦu a imaza i kaʦauan a mapuʎat, a sənəma a sənəma, nuka ʦaɉa aravaʦ, ʦara ʦa ʎaqədiqədi a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: All the people here in the world, from here or there, even those a long way off, they are certainly all our neighbours.

S.FORM: saka titjen a mapuɫat, aitsu imaza i katsauan a mapuɫat nia ɫaqediqedi, aya-i a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: saka ticən a mapuʎat, aiʦu imaza i kaʦauan a mapuʎat nia ʎaqədiqədi, aja-i a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: saka titjen a mapuljat, aicu imaza i kacauan a mapuljat nia ljaqediqedi, aya-i a mapuljat.
S.PHON: saka tiʦən a mapuʎat, aiʦu imaza i kaʦauan a mapuʎat nia ʎaqədiqədi, aja-i a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: So all of us let us all recognise that all the people in the world are our neighbours.

S.FORM: nu setsevung itjen tua selapalapay, nu setsevung itjen tua qemauqaung, nu setsevung itjen tua nasemalimsim, tja paseqeɫingaw tja tjiakaw tja pakavaɫutaw.
S.PHON: nu səʦəvuŋ icən tua səɭapaɭapaj, nu səʦəvuŋ icən tua qəmauqauŋ, nu səʦəvuŋ icən tua nasəmaɭimsim, ca pasəqəʎiŋaw ca ciakaw ca pakavaʎutaw.
S.FORM: nu secevung itjen tua selapalapay, nu secevung itjen tua qemauqaung, nu secevung itjen tua nasemalimsim, tja paseqeljingaw tja tjiakaw tja pakavaljutaw.
S.PHON: nu səʦəvuŋ iʦən tua səɭapaɭapaj, nu səʦəvuŋ iʦən tua qəmauqauŋ, nu səʦəvuŋ iʦən tua nasəmaɭimsim, ʦa pasəqəʎiŋaw ʦa ʦiakaw ʦa pakavaʎutaw.
S.TRANSL: If we meet those who are suffering, if we meet those who are crying, if we meet those who are in trouble, let us save, lead and help them.

S.FORM: aitsu a ini anan ka sekeɫang tua kai nua Tsemas, tja tjiakaw a pasa tjaiqayaw tjai Yisu-sama, uɫa namapaseqeɫing tiamadju.
S.PHON: aiʦu a ini anan ka səkəʎaŋ tua kai nua ʦəmas, ca ciakaw a pasa caiqajaw cai jisu-sama, uʎa namapasəqəʎiŋ tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: aicu a ini anan ka sekeljang tua kai nua Cemas, tja tjiakaw a pasa tjaiqayaw tjai Yisu-sama, ulja namapaseqeljing tiamadju.
S.PHON: aiʦu a ini anan ka səkəʎaŋ tua kai nua ʦəmas, ʦa ʦiakaw a pasa ʦaiqajaw ʦai jisu-sama, uʎa namapasəqəʎiŋ tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: Let us lead to Jesus those who do not yet know the word of God, so that they may be saved.

S.FORM: nu namayatutsu itjen mana uri napasusu itjen tua kai ni Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: nu namajatuʦu icən mana uri napasusu icən tua kai ni jisu-sama.
S.FORM: nu namayatucu itjen mana uri napasusu itjen tua kai ni Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: nu namajatuʦu iʦən mana uri napasusu iʦən tua kai ni jisu-sama.
S.TRANSL: If we do this we will fulfil the words of Jesus.

S.FORM: kiɫivaku tua su ɫaqediqedi, aya tjanuitjen a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: kiʎivaku tua su ʎaqədiqədi, aja canuicən a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: kiljivaku tua su ljaqediqedi, aya tjanuitjen a mapuljat.
S.PHON: kiʎivaku tua su ʎaqədiqədi, aja ʦanuiʦən a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: Love your neighbours, he says to us all.

S.FORM: amin.
S.PHON: amin.
S.FORM: amin.
S.PHON: amin.
S.TRANSL: The end.

S.FORM: pai anema nia sitjumaɫ tjanusun a naqemati a Tsemas, tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama?
S.PHON: pai anəma nia sicumaʎ canusun a naqəmati a ʦəmas, canusun a ti jisu-sama
S.FORM: pai anema nia sitjumalj tjanusun a naqemati a Cemas, tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama?
S.PHON: pai anəma nia siʦumaʎ ʦanusun a naqəmati a ʦəmas, ʦanusun a ti jisu-sama
S.TRANSL: What are we to say to you, Creator God, to you, Jesus?

S.FORM: maɫimaɫi aravats a su zukerin anga men a imaza i katsalisian, sa su kana paseqeɫiqeɫing anga tjanuamen.
S.PHON: maʎimaʎi aravaʦ a su zukərin aŋa mən a imaza i kaʦaɭisian, sa su kana pasəqəʎiqəʎiŋ aŋa canuamən.
S.FORM: maljimalji aravac a su zukerin anga men a imaza i kacalisian, sa su kana paseqeljiqeljing anga tjanuamen.
S.PHON: maʎimaʎi aravaʦ a su zukərin aŋa mən a imaza i kaʦaɭisian, sa su kana pasəqəʎiqəʎiŋ aŋa ʦanuamən.
S.TRANSL: Thank you very much for your reaching us here the people of the mountains and saving us.

S.FORM: anemanan nia sitjumaɫ tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama?
S.PHON: anəmanan nia sicumaʎ canusun a ti jisu-sama
S.FORM: anemanan nia sitjumalj tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama?
S.PHON: anəmanan nia siʦumaʎ ʦanusun a ti jisu-sama
S.TRANSL: And what are we to say to you, Jesus?

S.FORM: pai aitsu a nasepasalisaliw a tiamen su ruram-en amen sa su pakeɫangi amen ta uri nia pakazuanan.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu a nasəpasaɭisaɭiw a tiamən su ruram-ən amən sa su pakəʎaŋi amən ta uri nia pakazuanan.
S.FORM: pai aicu a nasepasalisaliw a tiamen su ruram-en amen sa su pakeljangi amen ta uri nia pakazuanan.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu a nasəpasaɭisaɭiw a tiamən su ruram-ən amən sa su pakəʎaŋi amən ta uri nia pakazuanan.
S.TRANSL: You have come to(?) us who had sinned, and you have taught us the way we should go.

S.FORM: anema nia sitjumaɫ?
S.PHON: anəma nia sicumaʎ
S.FORM: anema nia sitjumalj?
S.PHON: anəma nia siʦumaʎ
S.TRANSL: What are we to say?

S.FORM: pai, Yisu-sama, aitsu a mareka imaza i gadu a mareka tja kaka a katsalisian a namaviliviliɫ a namavavutuvutu a sitsuayan, pai aitsu su ɫaluayi anga men sa su tjautsikeli anga men ta uri nia sikatsaquan a maqaqeɫiqeɫing a mareka kaka.
S.PHON: pai, jisu-sama, aiʦu a marəka imaza i gadu a marəka ca kaka a kaʦaɭisian a namaviɭiviɭiʎ a namavavutuvutu a siʦuajan, pai aiʦu su ʎaɭuaji aŋa mən sa su cauʦikəɭi aŋa mən ta uri nia sikaʦaquan a maqaqəʎiqəʎiŋ a marəka kaka.
S.FORM: pai, Yisu-sama, aicu a mareka imaza i gadu a mareka tja kaka a kacalisian a namavilivililj a namavavutuvutu a sicuayan, pai aicu su ljaluayi anga men sa su tjaucikeli anga men ta uri nia sikacaquan a maqaqeljiqeljing a mareka kaka.
S.PHON: pai, jisu-sama, aiʦu a marəka imaza i gadu a marəka ʦa kaka a kaʦaɭisian a namaviɭiviɭiʎ a namavavutuvutu a siʦuajan, pai aiʦu su ʎaɭuaji aŋa mən sa su ʦauʦikəɭi aŋa mən ta uri nia sikaʦaquan a maqaqəʎiqəʎiŋ a marəka kaka.
S.TRANSL: We and our brothers and sisters here in the mountains, mountain people who were uncivilised and at enmity with one another in times past, you have made it clear to us and have told us how we should be able to help one another as brothers and sisters.

S.FORM: saka pai aitsu nuka men a matsadjatsadja, nuka namaqaqetsiqetsi a nia matjaɫaɫak, uɫa nia vetjek anga a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: saka pai aiʦu nuka mən a maʦaɉaʦaɉa, nuka namaqaqəʦiqəʦi a nia macaʎaʎak, uʎa nia vəcək aŋa a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: saka pai aicu nuka men a macadjacadja, nuka namaqaqeciqeci a nia matjaljaljak, ulja nia vetjek anga a mapuljat.
S.PHON: saka pai aiʦu nuka mən a maʦaɉaʦaɉa, nuka namaqaqəʦiqəʦi a nia maʦaʎaʎak, uʎa nia vəʦək aŋa a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: And so even though our parents lived far apart and fought one another, they are all to be our brothers and sisters.

S.FORM: nu nakisusu anga men, nu napasusu anga men ta su pazazekazekatj, uɫa men a natjemiatjiak anga sema tjaiqayaw sakamaya tjanusun.
S.PHON: nu nakisusu aŋa mən, nu napasusu aŋa mən ta su pazazəkazəkac, uʎa mən a nacəmiaciak aŋa səma caiqajaw sakamaja canusun.
S.FORM: nu nakisusu anga men, nu napasusu anga men ta su pazazekazekatj, ulja men a natjemiatjiak anga sema tjaiqayaw sakamaya tjanusun.
S.PHON: nu nakisusu aŋa mən, nu napasusu aŋa mən ta su pazazəkazəkaʦ, uʎa mən a naʦəmiaʦiak aŋa səma ʦaiqajaw sakamaja ʦanusun.
S.TRANSL: When we have become followers and fulfil your commands, may we lead them all to you.

S.FORM: pai uɫa men a pitjakemɫamɫang anga, uɫa men a nakikakezeng anga sakamaya tjanusun.
S.PHON: pai uʎa mən a picakəmʎamʎaŋ aŋa, uʎa mən a nakikakəzəŋ aŋa sakamaja canusun.
S.FORM: pai ulja men a pitjakemljamljang anga, ulja men a nakikakezeng anga sakamaya tjanusun.
S.PHON: pai uʎa mən a piʦakəmʎamʎaŋ aŋa, uʎa mən a nakikakəzəŋ aŋa sakamaja ʦanusun.
S.TRANSL: May we understand better, may we stand firm in reliance on you alone.

S.FORM: tisun a naqemati a Tsemas, naqemati a Tsemas a nakiɫivak tjanuamen a napasa maza i katsauan, uɫa men a nayayanga sakamaya; saka mareka vetjevetjek itjen, uɫa men a naya.
S.PHON: tisun a naqəmati a ʦəmas, naqəmati a ʦəmas a nakiʎivak canuamən a napasa maza i kaʦauan, uʎa mən a najajaŋa sakamaja; saka marəka vəcəvəcək icən, uʎa mən a naja.
S.FORM: tisun a naqemati a Cemas, naqemati a Cemas a nakiljivak tjanuamen a napasa maza i kacauan, ulja men a nayayanga sakamaya; saka mareka vetjevetjek itjen, ulja men a naya.
S.PHON: tisun a naqəmati a ʦəmas, naqəmati a ʦəmas a nakiʎivak ʦanuamən a napasa maza i kaʦauan, uʎa mən a najajaŋa sakamaja; saka marəka vəʦəvəʦək iʦən, uʎa mən a naja.
S.TRANSL: You are the creator God, the creator God who loved us and came here to the world, is what we should say; and we should say that we are all brothers and sisters;

S.FORM: uɫa ika men a nasemanviliɫ.
S.PHON: uʎa ika mən a nasəmanviɭiʎ.
S.FORM: ulja ika men a nasemanvililj.
S.PHON: uʎa ika mən a nasəmanviɭiʎ.
S.TRANSL: so that we don’t hate anyone,

S.FORM: kumaɫi a na nia vutu, uɫa nia tjiaken sakamaya.
S.PHON: kumaʎi a na nia vutu, uʎa nia ciakən sakamaja.
S.FORM: kumalji a na nia vutu, ulja nia tjiaken sakamaya.
S.PHON: kumaʎi a na nia vutu, uʎa nia ʦiakən sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: even those who were our enemies, and so that we only lead them on.

S.FORM: ayatutsu-i, uɫa tjen a sema tjaiqayaw tjai Yisu-sama uɫa namapaseqeɫing.
S.PHON: ajatuʦu-i, uʎa cən a səma caiqajaw cai jisu-sama uʎa namapasəqəʎiŋ.
S.FORM: ayatucu-i, ulja tjen a sema tjaiqayaw tjai Yisu-sama ulja namapaseqeljing.
S.PHON: ajatuʦu-i, uʎa ʦən a səma ʦaiqajaw ʦai jisu-sama uʎa namapasəqəʎiŋ.
S.TRANSL: Let us say this, so that we may come to Jesus so that we may be saved;

S.FORM: uɫa vaik a semusu tua sinan djalan ni Yisu-sama a tja tamasi, uɫa men a nayanga sakamaya marepaqaqeɫiqeɫing, nu izua uri matsay i kadjalanan, nu izua matsuɫatsuɫa, aya ti Yisu-sama tazua tulu tjanuitjen.
S.PHON: uʎa vaik a səmusu tua sinan ɉaɭan ni jisu-sama a ca tamasi, uʎa mən a najaŋa sakamaja marəpaqaqəʎiqəʎiŋ, nu izua uri maʦaj i kaɉaɭanan, nu izua maʦuʎaʦuʎa, aja ti jisu-sama tazua tuɭu canuicən.
S.FORM: ulja vaik a semusu tua sinan djalan ni Yisu-sama a tja tamasi, ulja men a nayanga sakamaya marepaqaqeljiqeljing, nu izua uri macay i kadjalanan, nu izua maculjaculja, aya ti Yisu-sama tazua tulu tjanuitjen.
S.PHON: uʎa vaik a səmusu tua sinan ɉaɭan ni jisu-sama a ʦa tamasi, uʎa mən a najaŋa sakamaja marəpaqaqəʎiqəʎiŋ, nu izua uri maʦaj i kaɉaɭanan, nu izua maʦuʎaʦuʎa, aja ti jisu-sama tazua tuɭu ʦanuiʦən.
S.TRANSL: so that our souls may follow the way opened by Jesus, let us say and help one another. If there is someone dying at the roadside, if are there people hungry, says Jesus in his teaching for us,

S.FORM: parepaseqeɫiqeɫingi, uɫa men a nayanga sakamaya nakikakezeng sakamaya ta su pazazekazekatj.
S.PHON: parəpasəqəʎiqəʎiŋi, uʎa mən a najaŋa sakamaja nakikakəzəŋ sakamaja ta su pazazəkazəkac.
S.FORM: parepaseqeljiqeljingi, ulja men a nayanga sakamaya nakikakezeng sakamaya ta su pazazekazekatj.
S.PHON: parəpasəqəʎiqəʎiŋi, uʎa mən a najaŋa sakamaja nakikakəzəŋ sakamaja ta su pazazəkazəkaʦ.
S.TRANSL: let us help one another, let us say, just relying on your commands.

S.FORM: ?aming.
S.PHON: ʔamiŋ.
S.FORM: 'aming.
S.PHON: ʔamiŋ.
S.TRANSL: Amen.

S.FORM: pai tisun a nia Tsemas a ti Yisu-sama, maɫimaɫi aravats su kinizangan amen tusa nia sinukuban i tjaiqayaw tjanusun.
S.PHON: pai tisun a nia ʦəmas a ti jisu-sama, maʎimaʎi aravaʦ su kinizaŋan amən tusa nia sinukuban i caiqajaw canusun.
S.FORM: pai tisun a nia Cemas a ti Yisu-sama, maljimalji aravac su kinizangan amen tusa nia sinukuban i tjaiqayaw tjanusun.
S.PHON: pai tisun a nia ʦəmas a ti jisu-sama, maʎimaʎi aravaʦ su kinizaŋan amən tusa nia sinukuban i ʦaiqajaw ʦanusun.
S.TRANSL: Jesus our God, thank you very much for guarding us during our time of worship before you.

S.FORM: pai a su pitsul a su garang a su kiɫivak a su valisakedan a su rupazekatjan uɫa su sinipakizangan tjanuamen a mapuɫat, a marevetjevetjek i Igiris, a tiamen a imaza i Tayuang a selizuk a katsalisian a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: pai a su piʦuɭ a su garaŋ a su kiʎivak a su vaɭisakədan a su rupazəkacan uʎa su sinipakizaŋan canuamən a mapuʎat, a marəvəcəvəcək i igiris, a tiamən a imaza i tajuaŋ a səɭizuk a kaʦaɭisian a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: pai a su picul a su garang a su kiljivak a su valisakedan a su rupazekatjan ulja su sinipakizangan tjanuamen a mapuljat, a marevetjevetjek i Igiris, a tiamen a imaza i Tayuang a selizuk a kacalisian a mapuljat.
S.PHON: pai a su piʦuɭ a su garaŋ a su kiʎivak a su vaɭisakədan a su rupazəkaʦan uʎa su sinipakizaŋan ʦanuamən a mapuʎat, a marəvəʦəvəʦək i igiris, a tiamən a imaza i tajuaŋ a səɭizuk a kaʦaɭisian a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: May your power, might, love, concern and forgiveness protect us all, our brothers and sisters in England and us here in Taiwan, all the plainspeople and mountain people.

S.FORM: aitsu a nia kiqaung nia pinaka tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: aiʦu a nia kiqauŋ nia pinaka canusun a ti jisu-sama.
S.FORM: aicu a nia kiqaung nia pinaka tjanusun a ti Yisu-sama.
S.PHON: aiʦu a nia kiqauŋ nia pinaka ʦanusun a ti jisu-sama.
S.TRANSL: We make our prayer through you, Jesus.

S.FORM: ?aming
S.PHON: ʔamiŋ
S.FORM: 'aming
S.PHON: ʔamiŋ
S.TRANSL: Amen.
